title: Elite (disambiguation)
content:
'''Elite''' can refer to several things:
*[[Special forces/Legends|Special forces]]
*[[The Elite (hotel)|The Elite]], a [[Hotel/Legends|hotel]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*The [[Izvoshra/Legends|private warriors]] of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]
*The [[Dark Side Elite]], the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] that served the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
*[[Elite (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Elite'']] was a name of an Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].
*[[Elite (Yuuzhan Vong)|The Yuuzhan Vong Elite]], the select few that made up the court of the [[Supreme Overlord]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].
*The [[Geonosian elite/Legends|Geonosian elites]], specialized [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] warriors.
*[[Geonosian elite beam weapon]], the weapon of the Geonosian elites.
*[[Emperor's Sword]], a squadron of skilled [[TIE pilot]]s in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] who served [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] directly.

{{Disambig}}
